2193530.name: World of Titans MMORPG
2193530.description:
World of Titans is a high-fantasy MMORPG built by MMO players who miss that feeling of logging into a world that actually feels alive. Form parties, build guilds, dive into dungeons and raids, and fight for your faction in a story-driven world where your character, your choices and your gear really matter.

Play your way

  • Player vs. Player: Small-scale skirmishes or large battlefield clashes where teamwork and timing decide everything.

  • Dungeons & Raids: Tackle challenging group content, learn boss mechanics and chase powerful loot.

  • Gear Set Bonus Stats: Hunt down full sets to unlock build-defining bonuses and push your character further.

  • New Weapon System: Master dual wield, shields and polearms, swap styles and fine-tune your combat identity.

  • Advanced Skill Trees: Shape your class into tank, healer, support or damage roles with meaningful choices.

  • Advanced AI: Enemies can follow, group up and disengage, making encounters feel more reactive and less predictable.

  • World Boss Fights: Rally the server to bring down massive threats and earn rare rewards.

Build your legend

  • New Class System: Refreshed class structure designed around clear fantasy, distinct playstyles and group synergy.

  • New Profession System: Gather, craft and trade with a fully reworked profession experience.

  • Legendary Quests: Take on long-form questlines that reward powerful items, story moments and unique cosmetics.

  • Treasure Hunting: Explore hidden corners of the world to uncover chests, secrets and rare collectibles.

Social by design

  • Guild Creation & Management: Found your own guild, organize events and manage ranks, permissions and progression.

  • Party System with Invite & Kick: Easy group tools for dungeon runs, world bosses and open-world roaming.

  • Faction System – Honored & Forsaken: Choose a side in the ongoing conflict and earn reputation, cosmetics and story arcs tied to your allegiance.

  • Added Companions: Unlock pets, companions and protectors to join you on your adventures.

Explore and customize

  • New Mount System with Legendary Mounts: Collect, upgrade and show off a stable of unique mounts, from grounded beasts to legendary rides.

  • New Teleportation System: Move efficiently across the world with unlockable routes and hubs that respect exploration.

  • Complete Character Customization Upgrade: Build a character that actually feels like yours with more options, more variety and finer control over your look.

  • Account Management Improvements: Cleaner, more flexible tools for managing characters and accounts.

World of Titans is designed as a long-term home for MMO fans: clear roles, challenging group content, meaningful progression and seasonal updates that keep the world moving.

Rally your friends, choose your faction and step into a world that’s built to evolve with its players.
2193530.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
